name: sales-engineering-mcp
description: Sales-Engineering / RFP-Response MCP — structured templates for security questionnaires (SOC2, ISO27001, HIPAA, GDPR, NIST CSF), RFP responses, technical attestations, and pricing/competitive battlecards. For mid-market B2B SaaS sales engineering teams. Disclaimer: structured templates; not a substitute for legal/security counsel.
author: Elisabeth Hitz <elibierhitz@gmail.com>
